businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant initial investi (négatif pour sortie de fonds).

inputs.label: Initial Date (days from start)
inputs.businessContext: Number of days from the start date to the initial investment date.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days from the start date to the initial investment date.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başlangıç tarihinden ilk yatırım tarihine kadar geçen gün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage vom Startdatum bis zum Datum der Erstanlage
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours depuis la date de début jusqu'à la date d'investissement initial.

inputs.label: Cash Flow 1 Amount
inputs.businessContext: Amount of the first intermediate cash flow (positive for inflow, negative for outflow).

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of the first intermediate cash flow (positive for inflow, negative for outflow).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk ara nakit akışının tutarı (giriş için pozitif, çıkış için negatif).
businessContext_i18n.de: Betrag des ersten mittleren Cashflows (positiv für Zufluss, negativ für Abfluss).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant du premier flux de trésorerie intermédiaire (positif pour une entrée, négatif pour une sortie).

inputs.label: Cash Flow 1 Days
inputs.businessContext: Number of days to the first intermediate cash flow.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days to the first intermediate cash flow.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk ara nakit akışına kalan gün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage bis zum ersten mittleren Cashflow.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours jusqu'au premier flux de trésorerie intermédiaire.

inputs.label: Cash Flow 2 Amount
inputs.businessContext: Amount of the second intermediate cash flow.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of the second intermediate cash flow.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant du deuxième flux de trésorerie intermédiaire.

inputs.label: Cash Flow 2 Days
inputs.businessContext: Number of days to the second intermediate cash flow.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days to the second intermediate cash flow.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci ara nakit akışına kalan gün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage bis zum zweiten mittleren Cashflow.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours jusqu'au deuxième flux de trésorerie intermédiaire.

inputs.label: Final Value
inputs.businessContext: Final value or cash flow at the end of the investment (typically positive).

businessContext_i18n.en: Final value or cash flow at the end of the investment (typically positive).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırım sonundaki nihai değer veya nakit akışı (genellikle pozitif).
businessContext_i18n.de: Endwert oder Cashflow am Ende der Investition (typischerweise positiv).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur finale ou flux de trésorerie à la fin de l'investissement (généralement positif).

inputs.label: Final Days
inputs.businessContext: Number of days from start to the final cash flow.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days from start to the final cash flow.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başlangıçtan son nakit akışına kadar geçen gün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage vom Start bis zum letzten Cashflow.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours du début au flux de trésorerie final.
